message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. We are discussing account ****8824 with a current amount due of 12921. Before any account-specific next steps can be discussed, verify identity using the minimum partial identifier required by policy.
I’m the borrower on ****8824. What’s the best payoff or settlement option you can offer, and by what date would I need to pay?

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. We are discussing account ****8824 with a current amount due of 12921. Before any account-specific options can be discussed, verify identity using the minimum partial identifier required by policy.
You’ve asked twice without saying what minimum detail you need—if it’s just the last 4 of my SSN or DOB month/day, say which one and then give me the payoff or settlement amount and deadline.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. To verify identity, provide either the last 4 digits of your SSN or your birth month and day only. I cannot provide account-specific payoff, settlement terms, or deadlines until verification is completed.
Okay, I can verify with my birth month and day—once that’s done, I need the exact payoff or settlement amount and the payment deadline so I can decide today.
Provide your birth month and day only to complete verification. I cannot provide payoff, settlement terms, or deadlines until verification is completed.
Before I share that, confirm this: once I give my birth month and day, you’ll provide the exact payoff or settlement amount and the payment deadline in the same reply.
After verification, I can only proceed within policy. I cannot promise a settlement amount or deadline in this stage. Provide your birth month and day only to complete verification.
If you can’t confirm you’ll provide concrete numbers after verification, then I’m not going to share more information just to get another vague response.
Understood. Without verification, I cannot provide account-specific numbers. If you do not want to verify in chat, you will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Then I’ll wait for the phone call, but I’m only interested if they can give me a specific amount and a firm payment deadline.
Understood. I’ve noted that you want phone follow-up only if a specific amount and firm payment deadline can be provided. We’ll keep chat closed on that basis.
